name: Power BI Semantic Color Palette
description: Semantic color mapping for Power BI reports. Use these colors consistently to communicate meaning through color.

positive.name: Forest Green
positive.usage: Positive performance, on-target, growth, success states

negative.name: Crimson
negative.usage: Negative performance, alerts, below-target, critical issues

neutral.name: Steel Blue
neutral.usage: Neutral information, base metrics, primary data series
neutral.note: Use on light backgrounds only, or darken to #2E619B for text

warning.name: Dark Orange
warning.note: Use with icon or pattern to supplement for colorblind accessibility

inactive.name: Slate Gray
inactive.usage: Inactive states, reference data, disabled, secondary context

accessibility.colorblind_safe: Supplement red/green distinction with pattern or icon
accessibility.high_contrast_mode: Test with Windows High Contrast mode
accessibility.alt_text: Always provide alt text for screen readers
